name: Vista Solutions
description:
Vista Solutions Inc. is a leading North American provider of machine vision integration and consultancy services, with offices in the USA, Canada, and Mexico. Vista’s primary objective is to be the “one-stop-shop” for all things related to machine vision - solutions, service, consultancy, and hardware. Vista designs and delivers automated machine vision solutions to a diverse client and industry base including Manufacturing (Automotive, Food and Beverage, Medical Devices, Consumer Products, Aerospace, etc.), Logistics, Infrastructure, and Mining. Vista’s offices are home to some of the most advanced machine vision laboratories in North America, including 6-axis robots, conveyance systems, and machine vision hardware (including cameras, lighting, 3D imagers, etc.) - everything required to setup Vista’s clients for machine vision success from Step #1: Image. Vista’s Areas of Expertise Include: • Automated Inspection (Quality Assurance, Defect Detection, etc.) • Vision-Guided Robotics • Non-Contact Measurement and Gauging • Tracking and Traceability (OCR, Barcodes, etc.) • Artificial Intelligence (AI) -based Inspection Solutions Vista’s Services Include: • On-Site Support / Service • Solution Integration / Deployment Services • Vision Evaluative Services - Camera and Lighting Selection - On-Site Assessments - Development of Vision Integration Standards • Machine Vision R&D - Engineering / Feasibility Studies - Proof of Concepts (PoCs) / Prototype Vision Systems • Vision Software Development - Custom Software Applications - Vision Algorithm Development - AI-based Inspection Models • Consultation - Design Review / Auditing Services - Scale-Up / Roll-Out Planning Vista’s Process: Vista’s 3-step approach to machine vision feasibility, risk mitigation, and client success. 1. name: Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems
description:
Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems (IVMS) provides advanced machine vision, precision metrology and automation solutions for manufacturers where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

IVMS was formed in 2026 through the merger of Industrial Vision Systems and The Sempre Group, combining automated machine vision engineering with deep expertise in high-precision metrology. The result is a broader capability supporting manufacturers with both automated inspection systems and advanced measurement technologies.

Our solutions are used across manufacturing environments where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

CAPABILITIES
• Automated machine vision inspection systems
• Precision metrology technologies and measurement solutions
• Inline and offline inspection for manufacturing processes
• Vision-guided automation and robotics integration
• Engineering, system integration and technical support

IVMS solutions range from bespoke machine vision systems and integrated inspection machines through to high-precision metrology instruments and software for advanced measurement, data analysis and quality control.

INDUSTRIES
• Medical devices & pharmaceuticals
• Aerospace & precision engineering
• Automotive & electrification
• Electronics & semiconductors
• Advanced industrial manufacturing

Through a combination of advanced imaging, AI-enabled vision software, high-accuracy metrology technologies and automation integration, IVMS helps manufacturers move towards fully digital, data-driven production environments.

IVMS is part of Oxford Metrics plc, a global smart sensing and software company focused on advanced measurement, sensing and data technologies. || Industrial Vision & Metrology Systems (IVMS) provides advanced machine vision, precision metrology and automation solutions for manufacturers where quality, accuracy and traceability are critical.

name: Advanced Machine Integrations
description: Advanced Machine Integrations provides custom machine vision and automation solutions for manufacturing environments. The company designs, programs, and integrates Cognex-based inspection systems for tasks such as code reading, OCR, part presence, measurement, robot guidance, and 3D inspection. It also builds pick-and-place cells, cobot applications, and turnkey production machines tailored to specific processes. Typical customers operate in pharmaceutical, food, paper, plastics, automotive, and packaging industries. Services span troubleshooting, upgrades, and new system delivery, including consultation, testing, commissioning, training, and ongoing support. || AMI designs and integrates bespoke machine vision and automation systems for manufacturing companies across multiple sectors. | Advanced Machine Integrations provides custom machine vision and automation solutions for manufacturing environments. The company designs, programs, and integrates Cognex-based inspection systems for tasks such as code reading, OCR, part presence, measurement, robot guidance, and 3D inspection. It also builds pick-and-place cells, cobot applications, and turnkey production machines tailored to specific processes. Typical customers operate in pharmaceutical, food, paper, plastics, automotive, and packaging industries. name: Contract Production
description:
Contract Electronics Manufacturing & Production

Contract Production Ltd specialises in providing low to medium volume contract electronics manufacturing (CEM) services to a range of companies across a wide variety of industries and market sectors.

We offer PCB assembly, box build, 3D AOI and turnkey assembly services covering material procurement, supply chain management, PCB Assembly,  Prototyping, Testing and quality assurance all under one roof.


Our customers cover a range of high technology market sectors including instrumentation, test and measurement and monitoring and for each of these customers we provide a range of different services, each tailored to suit their own individual needs.


Our range of services includes:

    Automated high-speed SMT assembly
    Conventional through-hole assembly
    Complete box build and test solutions
    3D Automated Optical Inspection (AOI)
    Full test and inspection
    Wave Soldering
    Conformal Coating
    Potting & Encapsulation
    Procurement and QA
    Project Management


Our aim is to provide our customers with a flexible, customer focussed service that meets their needs at every step in the manufacturing chain.

To discuss any requirements that you may have or to find out more about how we can help with your PCB assembly needs, please contact us;
